title: Semantic HTML Rendering, Contextual Escaping, and Determinism · Contract Workshop
summary: A civic-publishing pair incrementally builds deterministic context-safe semantic HTML renderer from original fixed content fixtures while retaining earlier Python, Git, HTML, CSS, URL, accessibility, security, determinism, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of deterministic context-safe semantic HTML renderer while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Render each validated node through one owned semantic mapping without reparsing generated strings as source.
Encode untrusted text and attribute values for their exact HTML context and reject unsafe script, style, comment, and URL placements.
Keep trusted renderer output distinct from untrusted author text and make every conversion into trusted markup explicit and reviewable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Renderer Contract
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop publishing team handles case 5983 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to render every node as deterministic semantic HTML through context-safe boundaries; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-render-determinism-1ffudb
# Competency: ssg-render-determinism.
# Case 8009: an accessibility-led community newsroom release.
# Operating constraint: preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions.
# Changed case: replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG.
def evidence_ssg_render_determinism_1ffudb(nodes: int = 14, rendered_nodes: int = 14, escaped_values: int = 6, unsafe_contexts: int = 0, duplicate_ids: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1ffudb = "1ffudb-bduff1-8009"
    assert evidence_variant_1ffudb
    evidence_axes_1ffudb = (
        "reader1ffudb",
        "source8009",
        "parsebduff1",
        "route1ffudb8009",
        "artifact80091ffudb",
        "recoverybduff18009",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ffudb)) == 6
    if nodes < 1 or rendered_nodes < 0:
        return False, rendered_nodes, "render-count"
    if rendered_nodes != nodes:
        return False, rendered_nodes, "render-coverage"
    if escaped_values < 1:
        return False, escaped_values, "escaping-evidence"
    if unsafe_contexts > 0 or duplicate_ids > 0:
        return False, unsafe_contexts + duplicate_ids, "unsafe-html"
    assert rendered_nodes == nodes
    return True, rendered_nodes, "semantic-safe-html"
